whyMaintainer: I've been looking for a meaningful way to contribute to the open-source community, and Cursor Boston is a perfect fit given my background in frontend development. I'm also passionate about supporting new developers and want to help build a space where people can learn to use these tools effectively.
relevantExperience: I have over 6 years of experience building frontend applications across multiple companies, including CVS Health. I've become a power user of Cursor at work and have seen firsthand how it improves developer velocity and impact when used correctly. I'd like to help others learn how to leverage it the right way.
